Class MenuBarIncludeController

java.lang.Object
hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.MenuBarIncludeController
public class MenuBarIncludeController extends Object
Controller for the menu bar included on every screen. Handles navigation between all screens in the app.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    about()
    Navigates to the About screen.

    Navigates to the Add Category screen.

    Navigates to the Add Transaction screen.

    Navigates to the Charts screen.
    void

    Navigates to the Home screen.

    Logs the user out and navigates back to the Welcome screen.

    Navigates to the Manage Account screen.
    void

    Navigates to the Manage Categories screen.
    void
    manageTransactions()
    Navigates to the Manage Transactions screen.
